Name: RegimenIntentVS
Title: Regimen Intent Value Set
Description: The clinical intent of an anti-cancer regimen. All codes are drawn from the SNOMED CT \"Intents (nature of procedure values)\" hierarchy (363675004).  **mCODE Migration Candidate** — Proposed for mCODE STU5.

Name: TreatmentLineVS
Title: Treatment Line Value Set
Description: Codes representing the ordinal line of systemic anti-cancer therapy. Used in LineOfTherapyObservation.valueCodeableConcept and the RegimenTreatmentLine extension.  **mCODE Migration Candidate** — Proposed for mCODE STU5.
